path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 27 - Street Fighter (3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2015)\01. Ryu Stage.mp3
description: Welcome to the Yoko Shimamura show! She composed all the legendary Street Fighter 2 music and here she is remixing her own classic. It's good.
title: Ryu Stage
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 27: Street Fighter

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 27 - Street Fighter (3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2015)\02. Ken Stage.mp3
description: It's alright I guess but I don't love it.
title: Ken Stage
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 27: Street Fighter

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 27 - Street Fighter (3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2015)\03. Guile Stage.mp3
description: Legendary music from the original game brought to life with this bombastic remix from my fave Yuzo Koshiro. I think he smashed it.
title: Guile Stage
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 27: Street Fighter

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 27 - Street Fighter (3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2015)\04. Vega Stage.mp3
description: I think everyone agrees that this is a huge track. The opening is amazing, the violin and guitar, the fast pace, it's great.
title: Vega Stage
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 27: Street Fighter

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 27 - Street Fighter (3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2015)\05. Player Select Type A.mp3
description: They added this track to the game because there's a part in World of Light where you play Street Fighter 2 in it!
title: Player Select Type A
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 27: Street Fighter

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 27 - Street Fighter (3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2015)\06. Ryu Stage Type A.mp3
description: The original is great. It's a banger. Shoutouts to Yoko.

album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 27: Street Fighter

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 27 - Street Fighter (3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2015)\08. Ken Stage Type A.mp3
description: This track gives Marble Garden Sonic 3 vibes and I like it.

album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 27: Street Fighter

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 27 - Street Fighter (3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2015)\38. Player Select Type B.mp3
description: They put in this song for the World of Light. Specifically it plays after you beat Ryu in the Street Fighter section's 'world map', before you go back and continue the game elsewhere. You will hear it for maximum 10 seconds. I feel like they put it in for completion's sake and I respect that.
title: Player Select Type B
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 27: Street Fighter

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 27 - Street Fighter (3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2015)\39. Ryu Stage Type B.mp3

album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 27: Street Fighter

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 27 - Street Fighter (3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2015)\47. Blanka Stage Type B.mp3

album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 27: Street Fighter
